project_info.name: VideyView
project_info.stack: Laravel (Backend) + Inertia.js / Vue 3 (Frontend) + Tailwind CSS + XAMPP

authentication.security_note: Forgot Password link redirected to Telegram; Admin can reset all passwords via Dashboard.

video_hosting: Manual URL Link for external CDNs (Videy.co, etc.)
Video Proxy (/video-proxy) to bypass ISP/WAF restrictions on Videy links.
ISP Bypass Client (App\Helpers\IspBypassClient) using CURLOPT_RESOLVE for hosting APIs.
Fast-Intake Bulk JSON: Process thousands of links via automated background workers.

thumbnail_system.mechanism: FFmpeg thumbnail extraction on-demand or batch.

monetization: Rebranded 'Special Offer' button as 'DOWNLOAD VIDEO' (Smartlink integration)
Subscription System: hasActiveSubscription() for premium content.
Admin Ad Guard: Internal AdHandler security to prevent ad leakage in Dashboard.

features: Aggressive Baiting: Combined <ins> and <div> traps with randomized ID cycling every 1s.
Mutation Monitoring: MutationObserver targeting 'ins iframe' to detect 1px scaling/hiding hacks.
Self-Healing: Automatic modal re-render if deleted via DevTools.
Zero-Cooldown: Removed cycle limits to ensure 24/7 active radar.
Trust-JS Recovery: Prioritizes successful ads-check.js loading for instant hard-refresh recovery.

video_health_monitoring.mechanism: 3-Layer Validation (Local Storage, Videy CDN HEAD, Streamtape API Status).
video_health_monitoring.storage: Persistent health_report (JSON) and last_check_at (Timestamp) fields in videos table.
video_health_monitoring.automation: Artisan Command (video:check-health) and Manual Trigger in Admin Dashboard.
video_health_monitoring.ui_indicators: Color-coded status dots (LOC, VDY, TAP) in Admin Video Management grid.

admin_visibility_2.0: Hosting Badges: Visual overlays (Local, Videy, Tape) on thumbnails for instant oversight.
Server Identity Masking: Conditional rendering hides host names from guests, showing only to Admins.
VIP Support UI: Redesigned Member Priority box with pulsing emerald status and premium aesthetics.

stages: FLOW 1 (Direct Upload): Admin upload file dari pc ke aplikasi -> simpan di local aplikasi -> aplikasi upload ke videy.co (jika bisa) dan streamtape (prioritas). Pembuatan thumbnail via sync.py (backdoor) jika video sudah ada.

FLOW 2 (Bulk JSON): Admin upload file json link videy.co -> simpan data link -> aplikasi download ke lokal (manual user via sync.py) -> app cek video & thumbnail lokal -> jika ada, upload ke streamtape.
ISP BYPASS 2.0: Direct backend IP (195.35.23.222) mapping for Streamtape to circumvent DNS/SNI hijacking.
REAL-TIME SYNC: Worker-to-Master percentage reporting (every 5%) for active transparency.
ASYNC REMOTE TRACKING: App\Jobs\CheckRemoteUploadJob is strictly dispatched to a prioritized 'checkers' queue to constantly poll api.streamtape.to/remotedl/status asynchronously.
FAIL-SAFE SYNC v2: sync.py handles total download failure and FFmpeg corruption by deleting the file and reporting 'failed' status to Laravel.
automated_distribution_pipeline.real_time_monitor: Dashboard uses global 3s polling (Admin/VideoController@progress) to update Ready, Pending, and Mirrored stats independently of the current page view.

features: On-Demand Fetch: Links provided via timed AJAX only upon playback intent.
Link Masking: No raw cdn.videy.co or streamtape.com URLs in DOM/Network Tab.
Anti-Inspect: Disabled right-click context menu on player area.
Local Relay: Serve data via dynamic video-proxy route to hide origin domains.
API Obfuscation: Streamtape API Key in Admin Settings includes an Eye-Icon toggle for masking/unmasking sensitive credentials.

ui_template_engine_v6.overview: Admin-switchable UI template system allowing real-time toggling between Classic Royale (desktop-first) and Mobile Spark (mobile-first SpartanKobs-inspired) templates.

classic.name: Classic Royale
classic.description: Desktop-first, floating navbar, overlay titles on thumbnails (desktop only), rounded-[40px] cards on desktop, mobile uses compact card-spark style, footer hidden on mobile, bottom nav visible on mobile.
classic.mobile_behavior: Title below thumbnail + CTA Tonton button + compact grid (gap-3) + bottom nav bar

spartankobs.name: Mobile Spark
spartankobs.description: Mobile-first SpartanKobs-inspired, persistent bottom navigation bar, titles always below thumbnails, compact grid (gap-3), tag scroller, search overlay, category bottom sheet, footer hidden on mobile.
spartankobs.mobile_behavior: Same as classic mobile + tag scroller always visible + search handled by bottom nav overlay

template_system.admin_control: Admin > Konfigurasi Sistem > 'Mesin Templat Antarmuka' card with visual template picker cards.

architecture.isSpark_provider: MainLayout.vue provides computed 'isSpark' (true when ui_template='spartankobs') to all child components via Vue provide/inject.
architecture.conditional_rendering: All template-specific UI is wrapped in v-if='isSpark' / :class conditionals. No separate component trees.
architecture.mobile_first_universal: Both templates now share mobile-first fundamentals: bottom nav bar, safe-bottom padding, compact cards, CTA buttons, hidden footer on mobile.

bottom_nav_bar.visibility: lg:hidden (mobile/tablet only, hidden on desktop). Shows on BOTH templates.
features: Glassmorphic design with active indicator line
Category bottom sheet with filters + tags
Safe area padding for notched phones

popular_tags_system.source: Tag model with withCount('videos'), top 12, cached 5 minutes
popular_tags_system.usage: Tag scroller (Index.vue - both templates), Search overlay (BottomNavBar), Category sheet (BottomNavBar)

title_placement.mobile: ALWAYS below thumbnail for both templates (text-[10px] font-bold line-clamp-2)
title_placement.desktop_classic: Overlay gradient at bottom of thumbnail (hidden on mobile, visible from sm breakpoint)

video_card.cta_button: Gradient indigo-to-violet 'Tonton' button with play icon, full-width, py-1.5 on mobile / py-2 on desktop

badges.premium: Top-left, amber gradient, crown emoji + 'VIP' text
badges.views: Bottom-right, badge-duration class with eye icon + formatted count

search_bar.mobile: Hidden (handled by bottom nav search overlay)
search_bar.desktop: Full search input visible in filter bar

tag_scroller.classic: Visible on both mobile and desktop when tags exist
tag_scroller.spark: Visible on both mobile and desktop when tags exist

backend: app/Http/Middleware/HandleInertiaRequests.php: Shares ui_template + popular_tags globally via Inertia
admin_ui: resources/js/Pages/Admin/Settings.vue: Template picker card with Classic Royale vs Mobile Spark visual selection, cyan accent for new card
layout: resources/js/Layouts/MainLayout.vue: isSpark computed + provide, unconditional BottomNavBar, safe-bottom always, footer hidden lg:block always, px-3 sm:px-6 header padding
pages: resources/js/Pages/Videos/Index.vue: Universal mobile-first grid (gap-3), title below thumb on mobile for both templates, CTA Tonton button, tag scroller for both, search hidden on mobile, hero clamp(180px,40vw,500px)
resources/js/Pages/Videos/Show.vue: Universal mobile-first padding (px-2 sm:px-6), rounded-2xl sm:rounded-[40px], min-h-[250px] player on mobile, compact info cards p-4 sm:p-8
components: resources/js/Components/BottomNavBar.vue: 5-tab mobile nav (Beranda, Cari, Kategori, Simpan, Profil) with glassmorphic design, search overlay, category bottom sheet

ad_leakage_prevention.problem: Sensitive pages like Login/Admin were loading ad scripts and anti-adblock modals.
ad_leakage_prevention.solution: Implemented route-aware middleware and strict component-level guards.
technical_details: Middleware (HandleInertiaRequests.php): Conditional prop sharing ensures 'ads' and 'anti_adblock_enabled' are null/false for restricted routes.
AdHandler.vue: Component now monitors window.route() and executes aggressive DOM cleanup on unmount.
AntiAdblockGuard.vue: Detection logic and DOM baits are explicitly disabled for admin routes and authenticated admins.

anti_adblock_toggle.feature: Admin controllable toggle for global anti-adblock detection.
anti_adblock_toggle.implementation: Setting 'anti_adblock_enabled' stored in DB, shared via Inertia, and used for conditional rendering in MainLayout.vue.

doodstream_integration.goal: High-performance video mirroring with Indonesian ISP bypass.
components: Admin Dashboard: Distribution Pipeline visualizes success/pending counts for both Streamtape and Doodstream.

player_server_selector.logic: Dynamic multi-host switching with static user labels.

admin_dashboard.ui_design: Glassmorphism architecture using 'backdrop-blur-20px' and 'bg-slate-800/40'. Features vibrant duo-tone cards with pulsed status indicators.
admin_dashboard.activity_log: Integrated 'Recent Logistics' feed showing the last 5 video distributions.

dynamic_server_switcher.admin_labels: Dynamic identity masking; Admins see real host names.
dynamic_server_switcher.visibility_logic: Buttons only appear if hosting_status === success AND mirror_links[host] is not null.

v3.0_autonomous_media_empire.fortress_backup: One-click DB Backup via Admin Dashboard.
v3.0_autonomous_media_empire.robot_auto_healer: Artisan Scheduler for autonomous task execution.
v3.0_autonomous_media_empire.aura_theme_engine: Theme Engine v1.0 with Dark/Light mode.

infrastructure_fortress.pwa_premium: Full PWA manifest with custom maskable icons.

ghost_automation.auto_healing_engine: CheckVideoHealthJob upgraded to autonomously trigger re-distribution.
ghost_automation.seo_pro: Dynamic OpenGraph pipeline injected through HandleInertiaRequests middleware.

elite_ux.theme_engine_v5: Global Dark/Light mode with CSS variable architecture and localStorage persistence.
elite_ux.custom_player_skins: Injected CSS Shadow DOM overrides for Indigo-accented player.

v6.0_ui_template_engine.core_feature: Admin-switchable UI templates (Classic Royale / Mobile Spark) via settings DB.
v6.0_ui_template_engine.mobile_first_universal: Both templates now enforce mobile-first design: bottom nav on mobile, titles below thumbnails, CTA buttons, compact grid gaps, hidden search (bottom nav overlay), hidden footer on mobile.
new_components: BottomNavBar.vue: 5-tab persistent mobile navigation (Beranda, Cari, Kategori, Simpan, Profil)
CTA 'Tonton' button: Gradient indigo-to-violet play button on every video card
new_css_classes: .card-spark: Compact video card with rounded-xl corners
.tag-chip: Compact tag chips for horizontal tag scroller
.badge-duration: Views count badge on thumbnail corner
.safe-bottom: Dynamic padding for bottom nav clearance + safe area
v6.0_ui_template_engine.admin_panel: Visual template picker with preview cards at Admin > Konfigurasi Sistem > Mesin Templat Antarmuka

external_hosting.primary: Streamtape (Host Integration 2.0: Editable via Admin > Settings).
external_hosting.automation: Zero-Click: Mirroring starts automatically after Local Worker (sync.py) reports completion.

ad_leakage_mitigation.middleware: Implemented route-aware conditional prop sharing in HandleInertiaRequests.php.
ad_leakage_mitigation.components: Hardened AdHandler.vue and AntiAdblockGuard.vue with route-based guards.
ad_leakage_mitigation.validation: No ad scripts or baits on Login, Register, or Admin Dashboard pages.

streamtape.status: Dinamis: Managed via Admin Panel Database (~settings table).

admin_fortress_hardening: Secret Path Obfuscation: Admin panel moved to configurable .env variable (ADMIN_PATH).
Audit Black Box: Full activity logging in admin_activities table.
Login Throttling: Strict rate limiting on login and admin routes.
Dynamic Host Logic: MultiHostServiceProvider injected via database settings.
